title: Cheaper Crafts
body:
# Cheaper Crafts

### A Datapack useful for SMP's

With this Datapack:

- The **Golden Apple** is cheaper to craft instead of 8 gold ingots only 4 are required.

![Golden Apple Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fc89a61b8943f3d1038e0261503110b26c083b66.png)

- **Cobwebs** are craftable, by using 9 strings you can craft 5 Cobwebs

![Cobweb Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/297b72c8f11d96aec6ffe4aca5b9cfb317aebd04.png)

Perfect for SMPs that want fair progression without grinding.

Any issues or other ideas feel free to join my discord server: [Click here](https://discord.gg/rvg9zESUeM)

### ❤️ Like the project if it helped your server!

# Installation
> ## Server (Multiplayer)
1. Open your server folder

1. Go to: world/datapacks/

1. Place the datapack ZIP there, no need to extract!
